title: Introducing Stargate Norway
titleZh: 隆重推出Stargate Norway
summary: We’re launching Stargate Norway—OpenAI’s first AI data center initiative in Europe under our OpenAI for Countries program. Stargate is OpenAI’s overarching infrastructure platform and is a critical part of our long-term vision to deliver the benefits of AI to everyone.
summaryZh: 根据我们的国家/地区OpenAI计划，我们将在欧洲推出Stargate Norway-OpenAI的首个人工智能数据中心计划。Stargate是OpenAI的总体基础设施平台，是我们为每个人提供人工智能优势的长期愿景的重要组成部分。
highlights: We’re launching Stargate Norway—OpenAI’s first AI data center initiative in Europe under our OpenAI for Countries program.
Stargate is OpenAI’s overarching infrastructure platform and is a critical part of our long-term vision to deliver the benefits of AI to everyone.
highlightsZh: 根据我们的国家/地区OpenAI计划，我们将在欧洲推出Stargate Norway-OpenAI的首个人工智能数据中心计划。Stargate是OpenAI的总体基础设施平台，是我们为每个人提供人工智能优势的长期愿景的重要组成部分。
